about_me: International Creative Business graduate with merit and a Digital Marketing minor, combining UX/UI, brand experience, digital content, e-commerce/web operations, research, and a two-year Information Technology foundation. Experienced in client-based university projects with external stakeholders, digital marketing/web development at Park Plaza Hotels Europe, and AI-assisted product/design workflows. Interested in roles that combine creativity, systems, technology, psychology, user behavior, and practical business impact. Open to career-building bridge roles when they are realistic, growth-friendly, and useful for long-term stability.

work_experience.title: Digital Marketing & Web Development Intern
work_experience.description: Digital marketing and web development internship supporting website, content, analytics, SEO, localization, and cross-functional digital operations. Created Figma concepts, supported website improvements and WordPress/CMS fixes, used GTmetrix, GA4, Google Search Console, and Mangools for performance/search insights, worked with HTML templates, supported localization and cookie/compliance updates, and coordinated with brand, content, F&B, HR, development, and external IT stakeholders.

work_experience.title: Language Tutor
work_experience.description: Provided language tutoring services independently for 5 years, managing client relationships and scheduling autonomously.

work_experience.title: Teacher Assistant
work_experience.description: Assisted teachers in classroom activities and supported students in their learning.

work_experience.title: Software Tester
work_experience.description: Reported bugs of an educational game developed for children who do not have access to education.

work_experience.title: Interpreter and Translator
work_experience.description: Provided interpretation and translation services for local government and refugee support organisations.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts - International Creative Business, Digital Marketing minor
Two foundational years / Propaedeutics - Information Technology
Teacher of English studies (one year completed / partial)

projects.name: PatronApp
projects.description: Developed a mobile app concept enhancing the concert-goer experience through interactive features, community building, and personalised event recommendations. Responsible for UX/UI design, research, prototyping, and user testing.

projects.name: Amstelhof Connect App
projects.description: Designed and prototyped an internal staff app streamlining operations and enhancing personalised member engagement through task management, AI-powered communication, and motivation tracking.

projects.name: Brand Activation & Community Engagement
projects.description: Delivered a brand activation project including a pop-up stand, grow kits, flyers, and social media content to boost brand visibility and community engagement.

work_authorization.summary: Authorized to work in the Netherlands/EU without sponsorship.

application_answers.preferred_workplace: I am comfortable with hybrid work and open to on-site roles. I am also open to remote work.
application_answers.are_you_fluent_in_dutch_and_english: No. I am fluent in English, and my Dutch is B1/intermediate. I am actively improving my Dutch for professional communication.
application_answers.work_authorization_summary: Authorized to work in the Netherlands/EU without sponsorship.
application_answers.career_bridge_openness: I am open to career-building bridge roles if they are realistic, growth-friendly, and useful for long-term development.

common_questions.why_looking_for_new_role: I recently completed my Bachelor's degree in International Creative Business with merit and a Digital Marketing minor. I am looking for a full-time role where I can combine creativity, technology, user behavior, and business impact while growing in a supportive team.
common_questions.biggest_strength: My ability to combine creative thinking with structured research and strategy. I work across UX design, branding, and digital marketing, which means I bring a holistic perspective to every project.
common_questions.biggest_weakness: I sometimes spend too much time refining a concept before sharing it. I have been actively working on sharing work earlier to gather feedback sooner and iterate faster.
common_questions.why_this_company: I am drawn to organisations that put the user and the experience at the centre of what they build. I always research the company specifically before applying to give a tailored answer.
common_questions.5_year_plan: I want to build toward a strong product, UX, brand, digital operations, or business-technology career path where I can grow into broader strategic responsibility, become financially stable, and keep using AI and digital tools thoughtfully.
common_questions.remote_preference: I am comfortable with hybrid work and open to fully on-site roles in the Amsterdam/Amstelveen area.
common_questions.describe_yourself: I am a creative and analytical recent graduate who likes turning messy problems into clear, useful experiences. I combine UX/UI, branding, digital marketing, client-project work, IT foundations, and AI-assisted workflows.
common_questions.experience_with_figma: Yes, Figma is my primary design tool. I use it for wireframing, prototyping, and building design systems.
common_questions.experience_with_google_analytics: Yes, I have hands-on experience with Google Analytics from my internship at Park Plaza Hotels Europe and hold a Google Analytics 4 Certificate.
common_questions.team_or_solo: I enjoy both. I thrive in collaborative teams but am also comfortable working independently and managing my own workflow.
common_questions.how_did_you_hear: Through the job board / online search.

cover_letter_style: warm, specific, and concise - highlight the strongest relevant angle for the role, including creative/product/digital fit or a realistic bridge-role growth case; avoid generic phrases

career_strategy.core_goal: Find opportunities that are good for Omar's long-term success, not only roles that feel like a perfect creative match. Prioritize realistic interview chance, career-growth value, and financial/stability value.
primary_paths: Brand Designer / Brand Strategist junior roles
E-commerce content / web content / digital merchandising roles
Product/web operations involving CMS, e-commerce, QA, content, digital assets, AI tools, or business-tech coordination
Junior Product Coordinator / Product Specialist / Product Marketing Coordinator roles
Marketing communications roles when content, brand, web, or event focused
strong_bridge_roles: Graduate programmes in business, consulting, data, analytics, product, marketing, procurement, operations, or supply chain
Research Assistant / Clinical Study Assistant if no strict medical credential is required
career_strategy.openness: Open to roles outside the comfort zone when they offer training, growth, stability, and realistic entry requirements.

client_project_experience: Worked on many client-based university projects with external stakeholders. Many projects are showcased on www.omarabdulghani.com.
